author.bio: Official @github support is here to help! No DMs, please. Tweet or send a note to http://git.io/c. Find even more answers at http://help.github.com and http://github.community.
author.name: GitHub Support

content.text: We're aware & looking into it! Keep an eye on http://status.github.com for updates. -SJ
content.html: We're aware & looking into it! Keep an eye on http://status.github.com for updates. -SJ
